title: Pricing
subtitle: Simple, transparent pricing. Practice is always free.

hero.headline: Build a practice that changes you
hero.body: Subscriptions give you a monthly rhythm of Qs to create affirmations, meditations, and rituals. Practice is always free — Qs only power creation.

creation.title: Qs power creation
creation.body: Every affirmation, meditation, or ritual you create consumes Qs. The deeper the work, the more they cost.

free.title: Practice is always free
free.body: Replay your content as many times as you want. Qs are only used when you create something new.

expire.title: Qs never expire
expire.body: Unused Qs carry forward indefinitely. Your creative momentum is never lost.

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Begin your practice with a weekly commitment.

growth.name: Growth
growth.description: A monthly rhythm for dedicated practitioners.

devotion.name: Devotion
devotion.description: For daily practitioners who want maximum creative freedom. More Qs, priority processing, and dedicated support.

footer.preferBuyQs: Prefer to buy Qs without a subscription?

comparison.heading: waQup vs Calm & Headspace
comparison.footer: Calm and Headspace charge you to listen. waQup charges you only to create. Listening is always free.

trialDisclaimer: No charge for {days} days. Cancel anytime.

credits.title: Get Qs
credits.subtitle: Qs power your creation.
credits.noExpiry: Your Qs don't expire — use them at your own pace.
credits.securePayment: Qs are added instantly after payment. Secured by Stripe.
credits.wantSubscription: Want a monthly rhythm of Qs instead?

errors.checkoutNotConfigured: Checkout is not yet configured for this plan. Please contact support.
errors.checkoutFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.stripePriceNotConfigured: This plan is not set up in Stripe for this environment. Please check that your Stripe keys and price IDs use the same account and mode (test vs live).
